title: cyclosorus longipetiolatus
intro: Cyclosorus longipetiolatus, also known as the long-petioled lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus longipetiolatus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to relieve urinary disorders. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus longipetiolatus can be consumed as a decoction or tea, or applied topically as a poultice to accelerate wound healing and reduce inflammation.
